title: Sunset Valley
description: If you love the simplicity and charm of vanilla Minecraft, but also want to add some flair and beauty to your world, then this modpack is for you.
body:
#### If you love the simplicity and charm of vanilla Minecraft, but also want to add some flair and beauty to your world, then this modpack is for you. 

This vanilla+ pack focuses on aesthetics and decoration, with mods that enhance the natural environment, add new blocks and items, and allow you to create cozy and cute builds. Whether you want to live in a rustic cottage, a fairy garden, or a medieval castle, this pack will give you the tools and inspiration to make your dreams come true. Experience Minecraft like never before with this cottagecore-inspired modpack.


Disclaimer:

This pack is using a dev version of bobby 5.1 found in [this post](https://github.com/Johni0702/bobby/issues/197) by [noah1510](https://github.com/noah1510) 

The original non updated version of bobby can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
